---
title: "Ad*Access"
page-layout: article
---

# Ad*Access

## Description

Digital archive of historical U.S. and Canadian advertisements from 1911 to 1955. Useful for research on marketing, consumer culture, media history, visual design, and advertising trends.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Historical Archives

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an account with a valid Yale email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://repository.duke.edu/dc/adaccess)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
